footer.appDetails: A simple solution to automatically and accurately take class attendance through Google Sheets.

copyRight.message2: Made with ❤️ by Kazi Tasin Hossen

home.department: Department of Computer Science and Technology
home.massage: This is an Attendance App that is only usable for the Computer Science and Technology (CST) Department.

signin.massage: Sign in to Google with the email address that has editor access to your class Google Sheet.

hook.acessMessage: Access denied! Please fix the permissions.

fixIssue.issue: You don't check the edit permission. Please see this video for resolve this Issue :

messages.pastLinDenied: Permission to paste link from clipboard not granted. Please paste manually.
messages.sessionClearMessage: Session cleared. You can log in again with the correct permissions.
messages.loadingFailMessage: There was a problem loading the sheet. Check your internet connection and permissions.
messages.sheetNotFoundMessage: The sheet could not be found. Please verify that your link is correct.
messages.acessDeniedMessage: You do not have access to edit this sheet. Please contact (CI) to obtain 'Editor' permission.
messages.wrongMailMessage: You do not have access to edit the sheet at this email. Please use the correct email.
messages.linkFalseMessage: The link is incorrect. Please provide a link to a valid Google Sheet.
messages.acessCheckingMessage: Checking Google Sheets access and subject code...
messages.linkBLankErrorMessage: Please provide a link to a Google Sheet.
messages.acessLimitMessage: You do not have sufficient permissions. Please reset your session and log in again.

dashboard.title: Attendance Input
dashboard.rollInputMessage: Type Roll and Press Enter or Space
